name: Jeff Koretke
title: Android Developer
bio: Experienced Android developer with deep expertise in Kotlin, MVI, MVVM, clean architecture, and modern Android development. Passionate about designing agentic, self-updating development workflows that maximize efficiency by strategically routing work across multiple AI models — exploiting the distinct strengths of each to compound output quality while minimizing wasted context.

experience.description: Android application development using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Implemented MVI architecture and modern Android development practices.
achievements: Introduced agentic AI coding workflows to the team, improving development speed and code quality
Built multi-model pipelines using Claude Code and Gemini CLI, routing tasks to each model based on its strengths
Designed self-updating automation that optimizes token efficiency across AI model handoffs

experience.description: Developed a healthcare app for seniors, focusing on user-friendly design and accessibility features.
achievements: Built Movement tracking feature using machine learning

education.description: Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and data structures. Developed strong problem-solving skills.

funFacts: Built my first Android app in college
Music lover with a passion for guitar
